channel.title: Kubeflow on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kubeflow on Tech Blog

item.title: Setting Up Kubeflow on Kubernetes: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: The car inspection went well, and I will sepnd the rest of my half-day leave documenting the steps for setting up Kubeflow, the machine learning toolkit for kubernetes. Preparation Kustomize introduces a template-free way to customize application configuration, simplifying the use of off-the-shelf application. The simplest way to get started is to download the precompiled binaries: curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/master/hack/install_kustomize.sh" | bash # Moves kustomize to a system-wide location sudo mv kustomize /usr/local/bin/ Next, pull the source code from the kubeflow manifests:
